Ah okay tyty
Who can i pair him with or in which team??

Hes pretty much an in general good shield, his best pair is arguably with pollux but he can stand on his own. Maybe Castor Erica tawil Doll could work? Castor and erica to keep the team doll for heals and tawil as the dps, meaning you’ll want use her wings for the main damage source. He really is best w pollux or clem, if you get dupes of him he can act as a dps though if you’d prefer that.
Ah okay thank you si much for the insights!

If you’re lacking a dps though i’d say pollux maybe? Thais rerun is soon anyways and shes pretty good paired with him. Add in an aigis and a tinct and you got a team with that too. So whichever you’d prefer really though pollux isnt too good w out enlightenments
